Job description

Full-Stack Engineer

Part-Time or Full Time  | Remote or Hybrid in San Francisco, CA |  Equity Upside + Path to Full-Time

About Uno Wallet

Uno Wallet is building the first AI-powered iOS wallet that automatically selects the optimal credit card for every purchase: maximizing rewards with zero effort. 

We're one of the first companies on Apple's newly opened NFC & Secure Element platform (iOS 18.1+), and we've just closed funding from a top-tier investor. Our CTO Saket Joshi built X's video recommendation algorithm at xAI. Our CEO went to Harvard Business School. We move fast and build things that don't exist yet.
 

The Role

You'll work directly with Saket to build our backend infrastructure from the ground up — APIs, data pipelines, merchant categorization, and the integrations connecting our iOS app to payment networks and financial data providers. Part-time or full-time contract to start, with a clear path to full-time and equity.

What You'll Work On

Building backend APIs that serve our iOS app from scratch
Integrating with payment tokenization services (Visa, Mastercard) and our TSM layer
Developing data pipelines for merchant category prediction and rewards optimization
Connecting to financial data providers (e.g., Plaid) for bank and transaction syncing
Architecting backend systems as an early technical hire

What We're Looking For

Solid backend experience — Python, Node.js, or similar
Comfortable building and consuming REST APIs
Experience with databases and data modeling
Ability to work independently and own open-ended problems
0-4 years of experience — new grads welcome if your work is strong
Bonus: financial APIs, ML pipelines, or real-time data systems

Compensation & Growth

Direct mentorship from our CTO who built xAI's recommendation engine
Access to Harvard and Stanford networks of CEO
Path to full-time + equity
We are not able to offer competitive compensation yet
